uplink.description: reportType 0x0C climate: +25.00 C, 50.00 %RH, 3.00 m/s wind (covers climate requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected authored from upstream oracle (Temperature 0x09C4/100=25, Humidity 0x1388/100=50, WindSpeed 0x012C/100=3). 0x09C4 chosen so humidity stays 0-100.

uplink.description: reportType 0x0C climate: -20.00 C, 10.00 %RH, wind not fitted (negative two's-complement temperature)
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Status report - 12' inputs. 0xF830 signed = -2000/100 = -20.00 C; 0x03E8/100 = 10.00 %RH; 0xFFFF wind = NoSensor sentinel, omitted.

uplink.description: reportType 0x0C climate with low-battery flag set (byte3 high bit)
uplink._note: Synthetic; byte3 0x84 => low-battery flag set, masked voltage (0x84 & 0x7F)=4 => 0.4 V, matching upstream's (byte3 & 0x7F)/10 numeric value.

uplink.description: reportType 0x07 air-quality: 500.0 ppm CO2, NH3 10.0, noise 20.0 (covers air-quality requires)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected authored from upstream oracle (CO2 0x1388/10=500, NH3 0x0064/10=10, Noise 0x00C8/10=20). NH3 and noise have no vocabulary key -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: reportType 0x07 air-quality: CO2 only, NH3 and noise not fitted
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Status report - 7' inputs. 0xFFFF NH3/noise = NoSensor sentinel, omitted.

uplink.description: reportType 0x01 particulates: PM1.0/PM2.5/PM10 as camelCase extras
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Status report - 1' inputs (0x0064=100, 0x00C8=200, 0x02BC=700). Particulate counts have no vocabulary key -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: reportType 0x0E total VOC as camelCase extra tvoc
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Status report - 14' inputs. VOC 0x0384/10 = 90 ppm. 0x0000 ch2/ch3 are valid zero readings (not the sentinel) but reportType 0x0E only carries channel 1.

uplink.description: reportType 0x10 soil: VWC 25.00 %, soil temperature -20.00 C, EC 1.000 dS/m
uplink._note: Synthetic; expected authored from upstream oracle (Soil_VWC 0x09C4/100=25, Soil_Temp 0xF830 signed/100=-20, Soil_EC 0x03E8/1000=1). uS/cm field /1000 -> dS/m vocabulary unit.

uplink.description: reportType 0x00 device-info frame carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Startup version report' input. Device-info frames (SW/HW version + datecode) are not measurements.

uplink.description: config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (no measurement)
uplink._note: Synthetic; matches upstream example 'Configure report response' input. fPort 7 carries config command/response, not telemetry.
Synthetic; only fPort 6 carries data reports.
Synthetic; data frames are fixed 11-byte layouts. Deliberate divergence from upstream, which reads past the buffer and emits NaN/0 for missing channels.
